title: Exon skipping oligomer conjugates for muscular dystrophy
abstract: Antisense oligomer conjugates complementary to a selected target site in the human dystrophin gene to induce exon 45 skipping are described.
claims: 1. A method for treating Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) in a human subject in need thereof, wherein the human subject has a mutation of the dystrophin gene that is amenable to exon 45 skipping, the method comprising administering to the human subject an antisense oligomer conjugate of Formula (IV):
